measurement.definition: native coherence at the registered response target B after completion of the one admitted A-to-B response-packet arrival window minus native coherence at B immediately before the corresponding native feedback-producer evaluation

window.start: after all registered contributions, interventions, active-history materialization, and the matched neutral contact are complete; immediately before exactly one native feedback-producer evaluation
window.end: after every packet scheduled by that one producer evaluation has either arrived or the evaluation has registered no response, and before any other B-affecting operation
forbidden_events: any unrelated B-affecting packet or direct coherence mutation
an RCAE-authored success or response transition

required_native_chain_evidence: feedback surface identity and live front/rear mask
scheduled A-to-B packet identity when present
A debit and B arrival coherence deltas
window boundary snapshots and event ordering
measurement.primary_field_rule: B coherence gain is primary; scheduled flags, feedback score, packet amount, and A debit are retained chain evidence and cannot replace it

proof.causal_response_meaning: all three accepted V paths terminate in the same native A-to-B continuation and the same receiving-substrate change at B
proof.unit_and_orientation: native coherence amount with identity orientation and higher aligned
proof.time_window: one matched native producer evaluation and its resulting arrival window
proof.comparator_role: two-source common-carrier constitution versus quantity-and-timing-matched repetition by one source
proof.aggregation: one opportunity per registered stratum with every seed and order retained
proof.missingness: scientific no-response is zero; any operationally incomplete primary record makes the full mode-seed panel not evaluable
proof.calibration_population: candidate-free equal synthetic response pairs exercise only the shared paired-margin analysis

cross_mode_semantic_equivalence.upstream_non_equivalence_retained: P, H_P/M_H, and P plus H_P/M_H remain distinct mode-specific causes and controls; sharing the downstream measurement does not merge or rank them

primary_pairing.rationale: this is the nearest insufficient-repetition explanation because it preserves total contribution quantity, operation sequence, timing class, support, opportunity, and carrier baseline while replacing two attributable sources with repeated writes from one source
primary_pairing.registration_matching_duty: I06 must match contribution type, quantity sequence, relative timing, target, route class, cost, latency, support, carrier baseline, neutral contact, response policy, responder, and opportunity; only source continuity and the necessarily corresponding source-route identity may differ, and any unmatched route property blocks the pairing

order_strata.candidate: S1 supplies q1, then S2 supplies q2
order_strata.comparator: S1 supplies q1, then S1 supplies the matched q2 operation

order_strata.candidate: S2 supplies q2, then S1 supplies q1
order_strata.comparator: S2 supplies q2, then S2 supplies the matched q1 operation

primary_pairing.order_policy: compute and retain one margin per seed and order stratum; do not choose a canonical order and do not average, minimize, maximize, or otherwise scalar-collapse orders
primary_pairing.scope_effect_of_equivalence: resolution-limited equivalence retains a multi-source common-carrier observation if its causal controls pass but prevents the preserved single-source relation from being reported as combined-state or combined-history support

aggregation_and_missingness.seed_pairing: same mode, seed, order stratum, frozen configuration, support, and pairing identity
aggregation_and_missingness.scientific_no_response_policy: completed valid window with no native A-to-B response has raw and oriented response 0.0
aggregation_and_missingness.operational_missingness_policy: raw and oriented response are null; the complete two-order primary panel for that mode and seed is not evaluable; no zero imputation or denominator removal
aggregation_and_missingness.fixed_denominator_policy: one registered opportunity per cell, seed, subconfiguration, and applicable order stratum
aggregation_and_missingness.raw_retention: retain every response and chain record for every cell, subconfiguration, seed, order, intervention, private diagnostic, and alternate responder

paired_margin.zero_denominator_policy: use measurement_resolution as denominator and classify a complete equal-zero pair within the resolution band

relation_classifier.panel_scope: complete primary margin panel or exact registered control panel
relation_classifier.robust_aligned: every evaluable margin is greater than delta
relation_classifier.narrow_aligned: at least one margin is greater than delta, none is less than negative delta, and not every margin is greater than delta
relation_classifier.resolution_limited: every evaluable margin has absolute value less than or equal to delta
relation_classifier.mixed_direction: at least one margin is greater than delta and at least one is less than negative delta
relation_classifier.narrow_counter: at least one margin is less than negative delta, none is greater than delta, and not every margin is less than negative delta
relation_classifier.robust_counter: every evaluable margin is less than negative delta
relation_classifier.resolution_unknown: one or more required records are operationally not evaluable or delta is not frozen
relation_classifier.not_applicable: allowed only by a separately reviewed control-specific rationale
relation_classifier.top_primary_signature: both order strata and all three seeds must exceed delta; a single order or seed never passes the signature

invariant.pass: all required absolute normalized paired differences are less than or equal to delta
invariant.ambiguous: delta is unavailable or any required record is operationally not evaluable
invariant.fail: at least one required absolute normalized paired difference exceeds delta

different_unsigned.pass: all required absolute normalized paired differences exceed delta
different_unsigned.ambiguous: delta is unavailable, any required record is operationally not evaluable, or only a proper subset exceeds delta
different_unsigned.fail: every required absolute normalized paired difference is less than or equal to delta

aligned_all.pass: all required oriented normalized paired differences exceed delta
aligned_all.ambiguous: delta is unavailable, any required record is operationally not evaluable, or evaluable differences mix aligned and resolution-limited values without a counter-direction
aligned_all.fail: any required difference is counter-directional beyond delta or no required difference exceeds delta

raw_visibility.pass: every frozen raw record is present and valid without scalar collapse
raw_visibility.ambiguous: an operationally unavailable record remains visible and correctly classified
raw_visibility.fail: a record is omitted, imputed, or combined into an unauthorized synthetic response

causal_chain_exclusion.pass: the candidate has the registered source-to-common-carrier-to-response chain and the substitute cannot satisfy that same chain, irrespective of raw output equality
causal_chain_exclusion.ambiguous: the chain is not reconstructible for either side
causal_chain_exclusion.fail: the candidate uses the bypass or the substitute legitimately satisfies the same registered common-carrier chain

access_relation_retained.pass: for each order, at least two of three alternate-responder seed margins exceed delta and none is counter-directional beyond delta
access_relation_retained.ambiguous: a required record is unavailable or only one of three margins exceeds delta without a counter-direction
access_relation_retained.fail: no seed margin exceeds delta or any seed is counter-directional beyond delta

common_control_rules.held_fixed: opportunity, support, response window, response policy, and the retained source's registered contribution operation
common_control_rules.effect: both marginal responses remain visible; neither may be silently promoted to the combined response

common_control_rules.held_fixed: all contribution physics, causal carrier state/history, times, routes, support, opportunity, and response configuration
common_control_rules.effect: failure blocks attribution-only invariance and R04

common_control_rules.held_fixed: explicitly not a pure-label intervention; changed amount, location, timing, type, or route is retained
common_control_rules.effect: divergence is diagnostic and cannot be called label-control failure

common_control_rules.held_fixed: remaining activity, unrelated schedule, support, opportunity, and response measurement
common_control_rules.effect: unchanged response blocks the affected combined-carrier dependence

common_control_rules.held_fixed: source activity and debit, lineage, support, opportunity, and response configuration while common-carrier admission is prevented
common_control_rules.effect: failure to remove or change the candidate relation blocks R03/R04

common_control_rules.held_fixed: marginal writes, route class, timing, support, and access opportunity; each private response remains separate
common_control_rules.effect: consulting both partitions is mailbox dependence and blocks R04

common_control_rules.held_fixed: nearest output opportunity and raw response retention
common_control_rules.effect: failure to distinguish the bypass blocks R04 even if outputs differ or match
owns the primary margin; non-alignment prevents the preserved single-source relation from supporting R03

common_control_rules.held_fixed: common carrier, contributions, support, policy class, response window, and non-private mask; responder role and its registered reserve/route are the contrast
common_control_rules.effect: pass permits bounded R05 access retention only

state_carried.relation: responses are invariant when complete native P state is equal
response tracks the intervened native P state
audit order and lineage cannot enter V

history_carried.relation: equal marginal quantities with different ordered H_P produce different later responses
P is excluded from the history-carried V path
response tracks active H_P through native M_H

hybrid.relation: retain raw responses for candidate_P/candidate_H, reference_P/candidate_H, candidate_P/reference_H, and reference_P/reference_H with exact held-fixed component identities
full candidate differs from reference_P/candidate_H while H_P/M_H remains fixed
full candidate differs from candidate_P/reference_H while P remains fixed
equal P with different active H_P/M_H changes the same native joint response
retain any interaction diagnostic but impose no nonlinearity, synergy, irreducibility, or superadditivity requirement
